name: Dimensionality Reduction Meets Network Science: Sensemaking on UMAP's kNN Graph
summary: arXiv:2607.08746v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: While UMAP is widely used for exploring high-dimensional data, typical workflows focus on its lower-dimensional embedding, largely overlook...
description: arXiv:2607.08746v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: While UMAP is widely used for exploring high-dimensional data, typical workflows focus on its lower-dimensional embedding, largely overlooking the rich k-nearest-neighbor (kNN) graph that UMAP constructs internally. This graph encodes the data manifold in its original high-dimensional space, before the distortion that UMAP's 2D projectio...
author: Duen Horng Chau, Donghao Ren, Fred Hohman, Dominik Moritz
